name: Lemon Custard Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, beat egg yolks with 3/4 cup sugar until thick and lemon-colored.
2. Blend in lemon juice; stir in grated lemon rind.
3. Transfer mixture to the top of a double boiler and cook over hot (not boiling) water until it coats a spoon; remove from heat.
4. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water and let soak for 5 minutes, then stir into the hot mixture until dissolved.
5. Cool custard at room temperature.
6. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar and beat until stiff.
7. Fold in the cooled custard.
8. Oil a large tube cake pan; tear the cake into bite-size pieces and arrange in alternate layers with custard.
9. Chill until firm, then unmold.
10. Fill center with whipped cream and decorate top with maraschino cherries. Alternatively, iced with whipped cream and garnished as desired. Yield: 10 to 12 servings.
